feat.name: Defy Sorrow
feat.text: You draw on this spiritual pain to push your body to greater heights. You gain the quickened condition until the end of your next turn. You can use the extra action only to Step or Stride.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: You’re dealt mental damage or spirit damage or you fail or critically fail a saving throw against a mental effect.
